_doc: EU AI Act Annex IV §1(c) — model lineage / supply-chain record.
deployment_id: eu-kiki/gemma-3-4b (router fallback worker only — not exposed as a chat-eligible card)
served_via: llama.cpp on tower:9304 — used as fallback / quick-response worker by the auto-router

source.license_note: Google Gemma Terms of Use — review obligations before downstream commercial use.

weights_file.comment: Local llama.cpp convert from upstream BF16 to GGUF Q4_K_M. SHA256 of the produced GGUF should be captured next time.

intended_use: Routing fallback only — when the MiniLM domain classifier can't confidently match a labelled domain, the gateway forwards to Gemma 3 because it is fast and reachable. Not surfaced as a primary card on https://ml.saillant.cc.
out_of_scope: Production-quality answers on domain-specific prompts (use the routed worker instead)
Healthcare / legal advice without human review
